---

title: generated/types.ts
nav_order: 4
parent: Modules
---

## types overview

Bot API object schemas, generated from the Telegram Bot API spec.

This is the **only** place `snake_case` is allowed (design §5.3): each schema's
decoded `Type` is `camelCase`, its `Encoded` shape is the raw `snake_case` Telegram
speaks, wired via {@link Schema.encodeKeys}. Decoding is lenient — unknown fields drop.

Added in v0.1.0

---

# schemas

## AcceptedGiftTypes

This object describes the types of gifts that can be gifted to a user or a chat.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AcceptedGiftTypes: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly unlimitedGifts: Schema.Boolean
    readonly limitedGifts: Schema.Boolean
    readonly uniqueGifts: Schema.Boolean
    readonly premiumSubscription: Schema.Boolean
    readonly giftsFromChannels: Schema.Boolean
  }>,
  {
    readonly unlimitedGifts: "unlimited_gifts"
    readonly limitedGifts: "limited_gifts"
    readonly uniqueGifts: "unique_gifts"
    readonly premiumSubscription: "premium_subscription"
    readonly giftsFromChannels: "gifts_from_channels"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AffiliateInfo

Contains information about the affiliate that received a commission via this transaction.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AffiliateInfo: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly affiliateUser: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly id: Schema.Number
          readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
          readonly firstName: Schema.String
          readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        }>,
        {
          readonly isBot: "is_bot"
          readonly firstName: "first_name"
          readonly lastName: "last_name"
          readonly languageCode: "language_code"
          readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
          readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
          readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
          readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
          readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
          readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
          readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
          readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
          readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
          readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
          readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
          readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly affiliateChat: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly id: Schema.Number
          readonly type: Schema.String
          readonly title: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly firstName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly isForum: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly isDirectMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        }>,
        {
          readonly firstName: "first_name"
          readonly lastName: "last_name"
          readonly isForum: "is_forum"
          readonly isDirectMessages: "is_direct_messages"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly commissionPerMille: Schema.Number
    readonly amount: Schema.Number
    readonly nanostarAmount: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  {
    readonly affiliateUser: "affiliate_user"
    readonly affiliateChat: "affiliate_chat"
    readonly commissionPerMille: "commission_per_mille"
    readonly nanostarAmount: "nanostar_amount"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## Animation

This object represents an animation file (GIF or H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound).

**Signature**


## BackgroundFill

This object describes the way a background is filled based on the selected colors. Currently, it can be one of - BackgroundFillSolid - BackgroundFillGradient - BackgroundFillFreeformGradient

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const BackgroundFill: Schema.Union<
  readonly [
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"solid">; readonly color: Schema.Number }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"gradient">
        readonly topColor: Schema.Number
        readonly bottomColor: Schema.Number
        readonly rotationAngle: Schema.Number
      }>,
      { readonly topColor: "top_color"; readonly bottomColor: "bottom_color"; readonly rotationAngle: "rotation_angle" }
    >,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"freeform_gradient">; readonly colors: Schema.$Array<Schema.Number> }>
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## BackgroundFillFreeformGradient

The background is a freeform gradient that rotates after every message in the chat.

```ts

  readonly type: Schema.Literal<"freeform_gradient">
  readonly colors: Schema.$Array<Schema.Number>
}>
```

```ts
          }
        >

        readonly isBlurred: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly isMoving: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>

    Schema.encodeKeys<

            readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String

                readonly bottomColor: Schema.Number
```

## BotCommand

This object represents a bot command.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const BotCommand: Schema.Struct<{ readonly command: Schema.String; readonly description: Schema.String }>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## BotCommandScope

This object represents the scope to which bot commands are applied. Currently, the following 7 scopes are supported: - BotCommandScopeDefault - BotCommandScopeAllPrivateChats - BotCommandScopeAllGroupChats - BotCommandScopeAllChatAdministrators - BotCommandScopeChat - BotCommandScopeChatAdministrators - BotCommandScopeChatMember

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const BotCommandScope: Schema.Union<
  readonly [
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"default"> }>,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_private_chats"> }>,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_group_chats"> }>,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_chat_administrators"> }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat">
        readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
      }>,
      { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat_administrators">
        readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
      }>,
      { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat_member">
        readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
        readonly userId: Schema.Number
      }>,
      { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly userId: "user_id" }
    >
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

```ts
          readonly canConvertGiftsToStars: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canTransferAndUpgradeGifts: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canTransferStars: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly canManageStories: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        }>,
        {
          readonly canReply: "can_reply"
          readonly canReadMessages: "can_read_messages"
          readonly canDeleteSentMessages: "can_delete_sent_messages"
          readonly canDeleteAllMessages: "can_delete_all_messages"
          readonly canEditName: "can_edit_name"
          readonly canEditBio: "can_edit_bio"
          readonly canEditProfilePhoto: "can_edit_profile_photo"
          readonly canEditUsername: "can_edit_username"
          readonly canChangeGiftSettings: "can_change_gift_settings"
          readonly canViewGiftsAndStars: "can_view_gifts_and_stars"
          readonly canConvertGiftsToStars: "can_convert_gifts_to_stars"
          readonly canTransferAndUpgradeGifts: "can_transfer_and_upgrade_gifts"
          readonly canTransferStars: "can_transfer_stars"
          readonly canManageStories: "can_manage_stories"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly isEnabled: Schema.Boolean
  }>,
  { readonly userChatId: "user_chat_id"; readonly isEnabled: "is_enabled" }
>
```

## CallbackQuery

This object represents an incoming callback query from a callback button in an inline keyboard. If the button that originated the query was attached to a message sent by the bot, the field message will be present. If the button was attached to a message sent via the bot (in inline mode), the field inline_message_id will be present. Exactly one of the fields data or game_short_name will be present.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CallbackQuery: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly id: Schema.String
    readonly from: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly id: Schema.Number
        readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
        readonly firstName: Schema.String
        readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      {
        readonly isBot: "is_bot"
        readonly firstName: "first_name"
        readonly lastName: "last_name"
        readonly languageCode: "language_code"
        readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
        readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
        readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
        readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
        readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
        readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
        readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
        readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
        readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
        readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
        readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
        readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
      }
    >
    readonly message: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.suspend<Schema.Codec<MaybeInaccessibleMessage, unknown, never, never>>>
    readonly inlineMessageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly chatInstance: Schema.String
    readonly data: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly gameShortName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  {
    readonly inlineMessageId: "inline_message_id"
    readonly chatInstance: "chat_instance"
    readonly gameShortName: "game_short_name"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ChatBoostSourceGiftCode

The boost was obtained by the creation of Telegram Premium gift codes to boost a chat. Each such code boosts the chat 4 times for the duration of the corresponding Telegram Premium subscription.

**Signature**


Added in v0.1.0

## ChatBoostSourceGiveaway

The boost was obtained by the creation of a Telegram Premium or a Telegram Star giveaway. This boosts the chat 4 times for the duration of the corresponding Telegram Premium subscription for Telegram Premium giveaways and prize_star_count / 500 times for one year for Telegram Star giveaways.

**Signature**

Added in v0.1.0

## ChatLocation

Represents a location to which a chat is connected.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ChatLocation: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly location: Schema.encodeKeys<
    Schema.Struct<{
      readonly latitude: Schema.Number
      readonly longitude: Schema.Number
      readonly horizontalAccuracy: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
      readonly livePeriod: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
      readonly heading: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
      readonly proximityAlertRadius: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    }>,
    {
      readonly horizontalAccuracy: "horizontal_accuracy"
      readonly livePeriod: "live_period"
      readonly proximityAlertRadius: "proximity_alert_radius"
    }
  >
  readonly address: Schema.String
}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ChatMember

This object contains information about one member of a chat. Currently, the following 6 types of chat members are supported: - ChatMemberOwner - ChatMemberAdministrator - ChatMemberMember - ChatMemberRestricted - ChatMemberLeft - ChatMemberBanned

## ChatMemberBanned

## ChosenInlineResult

Represents a result of an inline query that was chosen by the user and sent to their chat partner. Note: It is necessary to enable inline feedback via @BotFather in order to receive these objects in updates.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ChosenInlineResult: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly resultId: Schema.String
    readonly from: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly id: Schema.Number
        readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
        readonly firstName: Schema.String
        readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      {
        readonly isBot: "is_bot"
        readonly firstName: "first_name"
        readonly lastName: "last_name"
        readonly languageCode: "language_code"
        readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
        readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
        readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
        readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
        readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
        readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
        readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
        readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
        readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
        readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
        readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
        readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
      }
    >
    readonly location: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly latitude: Schema.Number
          readonly longitude: Schema.Number
          readonly horizontalAccuracy: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
          readonly livePeriod: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
          readonly heading: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
          readonly proximityAlertRadius: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        }>,
        {
          readonly horizontalAccuracy: "horizontal_accuracy"
          readonly livePeriod: "live_period"
          readonly proximityAlertRadius: "proximity_alert_radius"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly inlineMessageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly query: Schema.String
  }>,
  { readonly resultId: "result_id"; readonly inlineMessageId: "inline_message_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

Added in v0.1.0

## Document

This object represents a general file (as opposed to photos, voice messages and audio files).

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const Document: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly fileId: Schema.String
    readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String
    readonly thumbnail: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly fileId: Schema.String
          readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String

          readonly height: Schema.Number
          readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        }>,
        { readonly fileId: "file_id"; readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"; readonly fileSize: "file_size" }
      >
    >
    readonly fileName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly mimeType: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  {
    readonly fileId: "file_id"
    readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"
    readonly fileName: "file_name"
    readonly mimeType: "mime_type"
    readonly fileSize: "file_size"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## EncryptedCredentials

Describes data required for decrypting and authenticating EncryptedPassportElement. See the Telegram Passport Documentation for a complete description of the data decryption and authentication processes.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const EncryptedCredentials: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly data: Schema.String
  readonly hash: Schema.String
  readonly secret: Schema.String
}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## EncryptedPassportElement

Describes documents or other Telegram Passport elements shared with the bot by the user.

Added in v0.1.0

## File

This object represents a file ready to be downloaded. The file can be downloaded via the link https://api.telegram.org/file/bot<token>/<file_path>. It is guaranteed that the link will be valid for at least 1 hour. When the link expires, a new one can be requested by calling getFile.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const File: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly fileId: Schema.String
    readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String
    readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly filePath: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  {
    readonly fileId: "file_id"
    readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"
    readonly fileSize: "file_size"
    readonly filePath: "file_path"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ForceReply

Upon receiving a message with this object, Telegram clients will display a reply interface to the user (act as if the user has selected the bot's message and tapped 'Reply'). This can be extremely useful if you want to create user-friendly step-by-step interfaces without having to sacrifice privacy mode. Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a user account.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ForceReply: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly forceReply: Schema.Boolean
    readonly inputFieldPlaceholder: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly selective: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  { readonly forceReply: "force_reply"; readonly inputFieldPlaceholder: "input_field_placeholder" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ForumTopic

This object represents a forum topic.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ForumTopic: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.Number
    readonly name: Schema.String
    readonly iconColor: Schema.Number
    readonly iconCustomEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly isNameImplicit: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
    readonly iconColor: "icon_color"
    readonly iconCustomEmojiId: "icon_custom_emoji_id"
    readonly isNameImplicit: "is_name_implicit"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ForumTopicClosed

This object represents a service message about a forum topic closed in the chat. Currently holds no information.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ForumTopicClosed: Schema.Struct<{}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ForumTopicCreated

This object represents a service message about a new forum topic created in the chat.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ForumTopicCreated: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly name: Schema.String
    readonly iconColor: Schema.Number
    readonly iconCustomEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly isNameImplicit: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,

    readonly iconColor: "icon_color"
```

## InlineKeyboardButton

This object represents one button of an inline keyboard. Exactly one of the fields other than text, icon_custom_emoji_id, and style must be used to specify the type of the button.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InlineKeyboardButton: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly text: Schema.String
    readonly iconCustomEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>

      Schema.encodeKeys<

          readonly url: Schema.Literal<"check">
          readonly forwardText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly botUsername: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Literal<"the">>
          readonly requestWriteAccess: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        }>,
        {
          readonly forwardText: "forward_text"
          readonly botUsername: "bot_username"
          readonly requestWriteAccess: "request_write_access"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly switchInlineQuery: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly switchInlineQueryCurrentChat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly switchInlineQueryChosenChat: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly query: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly allowUserChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly allowBotChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly allowGroupChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly allowChannelChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>

        {
          readonly allowUserChats: "allow_user_chats"
          readonly allowBotChats: "allow_bot_chats"
          readonly allowGroupChats: "allow_group_chats"
          readonly allowChannelChats: "allow_channel_chats"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly copyText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{ readonly text: Schema.String }>>
    readonly callbackGame: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{}>>
    readonly pay: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly iconCustomEmojiId: "icon_custom_emoji_id"
    readonly callbackData: "callback_data"
    readonly webApp: "web_app"
    readonly loginUrl: "login_url"
    readonly switchInlineQuery: "switch_inline_query"
    readonly switchInlineQueryCurrentChat: "switch_inline_query_current_chat"
    readonly switchInlineQueryChosenChat: "switch_inline_query_chosen_chat"
```

## InlineQuery

## InlineQueryResult

This object represents one result of an inline query. Telegram clients currently support results of the following 20 types: - InlineQueryResultCachedAudio - InlineQueryResultCachedDocument - InlineQueryResultCachedGif - InlineQueryResultCachedMpeg4Gif - InlineQueryResultCachedPhoto - InlineQueryResultCachedSticker - InlineQueryResultCachedVideo - InlineQueryResultCachedVoice - InlineQueryResultArticle - InlineQueryResultAudio - InlineQueryResultContact - InlineQueryResultGame - InlineQueryResultDocument - InlineQueryResultGif - InlineQueryResultLocation - InlineQueryResultMpeg4Gif - InlineQueryResultPhoto - InlineQueryResultVenue - InlineQueryResultVideo - InlineQueryResultVoice Note: All URLs passed in inline query results will be available to end users and therefore must be assumed to be public.

```ts
                      readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                    }>,
```

## InlineQueryResultAudio

Represents a link to an MP3 audio file. By default, this audio file will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the audio.

## InlineQueryResultCachedAudio

Represents a link to an MP3 audio file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this audio file will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the audio.

## InlineQueryResultCachedGif

Represents a link to an animated GIF file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this animated GIF file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with specified content instead of the animation.

## InlineQueryResultCachedMpeg4Gif

Represents a link to a video animation (H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound) stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this animated MPEG-4 file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

## InlineQueryResultCachedPhoto

Represents a link to a photo stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this photo will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the photo.

## InlineQueryResultCachedSticker

Represents a link to a sticker stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this sticker will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the sticker.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InlineQueryResultCachedSticker: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly type: Schema.Literal<"sticker">
    readonly id: Schema.String
    readonly stickerFileId: Schema.String
    readonly replyMarkup: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly inlineKeyboard: Schema.$Array<
            Schema.$Array<
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly text: Schema.String
                  readonly iconCustomEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly style: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly callbackData: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly webApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{ readonly url: Schema.String }>>
                  readonly loginUrl: Schema.optionalKey<
                    Schema.encodeKeys<
                      Schema.Struct<{
                        readonly url: Schema.Literal<"check">
                        readonly forwardText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                        readonly botUsername: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Literal<"the">>
                        readonly requestWriteAccess: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      }>,
                      {
                        readonly forwardText: "forward_text"
                        readonly botUsername: "bot_username"
                        readonly requestWriteAccess: "request_write_access"
                      }
                    >
                  >
                  readonly switchInlineQuery: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly switchInlineQueryCurrentChat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly switchInlineQueryChosenChat: Schema.optionalKey<
                    Schema.encodeKeys<
                      Schema.Struct<{

                        readonly allowUserChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        readonly allowBotChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        readonly allowGroupChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        readonly allowChannelChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      }>,
                      {

                        readonly allowBotChats: "allow_bot_chats"
                        readonly allowGroupChats: "allow_group_chats"
                        readonly allowChannelChats: "allow_channel_chats"
                      }
                    >
                  >
                  readonly copyText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{ readonly text: Schema.String }>>
```

## InlineQueryResultCachedVideo

Represents a link to a video file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this video file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the video.

## InlineQueryResultCachedVoice

Represents a link to a voice message stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this voice message will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the voice message.

**Signature**

## InlineQueryResultContact

## InlineQueryResultDocument

Represents a link to a file. By default, this file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the file. Currently, only .PDF and .ZIP files can be sent using this method.

**Signature**

```ts

                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
```

## InlineQueryResultGif

Represents a link to an animated GIF file. By default, this animated GIF file will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

## InlineQueryResultLocation

Represents a location on a map. By default, the location will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the location.

## InlineQueryResultMpeg4Gif

Represents a link to a video animation (H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound). By default, this animated MPEG-4 file will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

## InlineQueryResultPhoto

Represents a link to a photo. By default, this photo will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the photo.

## InlineQueryResultVideo

Represents a link to a page containing an embedded video player or a video file. By default, this video file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the video.

## InlineQueryResultVoice

Represents a link to a voice recording in an .OGG container encoded with OPUS. By default, this voice recording will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the the voice message.

## InlineQueryResultsButton

```ts
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputFile

The contents of a file to be uploaded. Modelled as opaque `unknown`: fibergram
currently sends `file_id`/URL strings inline; true multipart upload is future work.
Kept by hand (never generated) — see `SKIP_TYPES` in the generator.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputFile: Schema.Unknown
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputMessageContent

This object represents the content of a message to be sent as a result of an inline query. Telegram clients currently support the following types: - InputTextMessageContent - InputRichMessageContent - InputLocationMessageContent - InputVenueMessageContent - InputContactMessageContent - InputInvoiceMessageContent

**Signature**

```ts

  readonly [

                      readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                    }>,
                    {
                      readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                      readonly firstName: "first_name"
                      readonly lastName: "last_name"
                      readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                      readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                      readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                      readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                      readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                      readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                      readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                      readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                      readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                      readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                      readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                      readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"

                    }
                  >
                >

                readonly unixTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>

              }>,
              {
                readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
                readonly unixTime: "unix_time"

              }
            >
          >
        >

          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly isDisabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
              readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
              readonly preferSmallMedia: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
              readonly preferLargeMedia: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
              readonly showAboveText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
            }>,
            {
              readonly isDisabled: "is_disabled"

              readonly preferLargeMedia: "prefer_large_media"
```

## InputPaidMedia

This object describes the paid media to be sent. Currently, it can be one of - InputPaidMediaLivePhoto - InputPaidMediaPhoto - InputPaidMediaVideo

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputPaidMedia: Schema.Union<
  readonly [
    Schema.Struct<{
      readonly type: Schema.Literal<"live_photo">
      readonly media: Schema.String
      readonly photo: Schema.String
    }>,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"photo">; readonly media: Schema.String }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"video">
        readonly media: Schema.String
        readonly thumbnail: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly cover: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly startTimestamp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        readonly width: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        readonly height: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        readonly duration: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        readonly supportsStreaming: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      { readonly startTimestamp: "start_timestamp"; readonly supportsStreaming: "supports_streaming" }
    >
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

Added in v0.1.0

## InputPollOption

This object contains information about one answer option in a poll to be sent.

Added in v0.1.0

## InputProfilePhoto

This object describes a profile photo to set. Currently, it can be one of - InputProfilePhotoStatic - InputProfilePhotoAnimated

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputProfilePhoto: Schema.Union<
  readonly [
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"static">; readonly photo: Schema.String }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"animated">
        readonly animation: Schema.String
        readonly mainFrameTimestamp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
      }>,
      { readonly mainFrameTimestamp: "main_frame_timestamp" }
    >
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputProfilePhotoAnimated

An animated profile photo in the MPEG4 format.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputProfilePhotoAnimated: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly type: Schema.Literal<"animated">
    readonly animation: Schema.String
    readonly mainFrameTimestamp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  { readonly mainFrameTimestamp: "main_frame_timestamp" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputProfilePhotoStatic

A static profile photo in the .JPG format.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputProfilePhotoStatic: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly type: Schema.Literal<"static">
  readonly photo: Schema.String
}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputRichMessage

Describes a rich message to be sent. Exactly one of the fields html or markdown must be used.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputRichMessage: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly html: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly markdown: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly isRtl: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly skipEntityDetection: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  { readonly isRtl: "is_rtl"; readonly skipEntityDetection: "skip_entity_detection" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputRichMessageContent

Represents the content of a rich message to be sent as the result of an inline query.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const InputRichMessageContent: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly richMessage: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly html: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly markdown: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly isRtl: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly skipEntityDetection: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      { readonly isRtl: "is_rtl"; readonly skipEntityDetection: "skip_entity_detection" }
    >
  }>,
  { readonly richMessage: "rich_message" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## InputSticker

**Signature**

```ts

  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly sticker: Schema.String
    readonly format: Schema.Literal<"one">

      >
    >
    readonly keywords: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.$Array<Schema.String>>
  }>,
  { readonly emojiList: "emoji_list"; readonly maskPosition: "mask_position" }
>
```

```ts
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"

                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }
              >
            >

          }>,
```

## KeyboardButton

This object represents one button of the reply keyboard. At most one of the fields other than text, icon_custom_emoji_id, and style must be used to specify the type of the button. For simple text buttons, String can be used instead of this object to specify the button text.

**Signature**

```ts
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly text: Schema.String

          readonly maxQuantity: "max_quantity"

          readonly requestUsername: "request_username"
          readonly requestPhoto: "request_photo"
        }
      >
    >
    readonly requestChat: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{

          readonly chatIsForum: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>

                readonly canEditStories: Schema.Boolean
                readonly canDeleteStories: Schema.Boolean

                readonly canEditMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                readonly canPinMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                readonly canManageTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                readonly canManageDirectMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                readonly canManageTags: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>

                readonly canManageTags: "can_manage_tags"
```

## KeyboardButtonRequestChat

This object defines the criteria used to request a suitable chat. Information about the selected chat will be shared with the bot when the corresponding button is pressed. The bot will be granted requested rights in the chat if appropriate. More about requesting chats: https://core.telegram.org/bots/features#chat-and-user-selection.

## LoginUrl

This object represents a parameter of the inline keyboard button used to automatically authorize a user. Serves as a great replacement for the Telegram Login Widget when the user is coming from Telegram. All the user needs to do is tap/click a button and confirm that they want to log in: Telegram apps support these buttons as of version 5.7.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const LoginUrl: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly url: Schema.Literal<"check">
    readonly forwardText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly botUsername: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Literal<"the">>
    readonly requestWriteAccess: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly forwardText: "forward_text"
    readonly botUsername: "bot_username"
    readonly requestWriteAccess: "request_write_access"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ManagedBotCreated

This object contains information about the bot that was created to be managed by the current bot.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ManagedBotCreated: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly bot: Schema.encodeKeys<
    Schema.Struct<{
      readonly id: Schema.Number

      readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
      readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
      readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
      readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
```

## MaybeInaccessibleMessage

This object describes a message that can be inaccessible to the bot. It can be one of - Message - InaccessibleMessage

**Signature**

```ts

```

Added in v0.1.0

## MenuButton

This object describes the bot's menu button in a private chat. It should be one of - MenuButtonCommands - MenuButtonWebApp - MenuButtonDefault If a menu button other than MenuButtonDefault is set for a private chat, then it is applied in the chat. Otherwise the default menu button is applied. By default, the menu button opens the list of bot commands.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const MenuButton: Schema.Union<
  readonly [
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"commands"> }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"web_app">
        readonly text: Schema.String
        readonly webApp: Schema.Struct<{ readonly url: Schema.String }>
      }>,
      { readonly webApp: "web_app" }
    >,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"default"> }>
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

```ts
    readonly date: Schema.Number

      >
```

```ts
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"custom_emoji">; readonly customEmojiId: Schema.String }>,
            { readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id" }
          >,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"paid"> }>
        ]
      >
    >
  }>,
  {
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
    readonly actorChat: "actor_chat"
    readonly oldReaction: "old_reaction"
    readonly newReaction: "new_reaction"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## OrderInfo

This object represents information about an order.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const OrderInfo: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly name: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly phoneNumber: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly email: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly shippingAddress: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly countryCode: Schema.String
          readonly state: Schema.String
          readonly city: Schema.String
          readonly streetLine1: Schema.String
          readonly streetLine2: Schema.String
          readonly postCode: Schema.String
        }>,
        {
          readonly countryCode: "country_code"
          readonly streetLine1: "street_line1"
          readonly streetLine2: "street_line2"
          readonly postCode: "post_code"
        }
      >
    >
  }>,
  { readonly phoneNumber: "phone_number"; readonly shippingAddress: "shipping_address" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## OwnedGift

## PaidMedia

This object describes paid media. Currently, it can be one of - PaidMediaLivePhoto - PaidMediaPhoto - PaidMediaPreview - PaidMediaVideo

**Signature**

```ts

  readonly [
    Schema.encodeKeys<
```

## PaidMediaPreview

The paid media isn't available before the payment.

**Signature**

## PassportElementError

This object represents an error in the Telegram Passport element which was submitted that should be resolved by the user. It should be one of: - PassportElementErrorDataField - PassportElementErrorFrontSide - PassportElementErrorReverseSide - PassportElementErrorSelfie - PassportElementErrorFile - PassportElementErrorFiles - PassportElementErrorTranslationFile - PassportElementErrorTranslationFiles - PassportElementErrorUnspecified

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const PassportElementError: Schema.Union<
  readonly [
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"data">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fieldName: Schema.String
        readonly dataHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fieldName: "field_name"; readonly dataHash: "data_hash" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"front_side">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"reverse_side">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"selfie">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"file">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"files">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHashes: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHashes: "file_hashes" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"translation_file">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"translation_files">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly fileHashes: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly fileHashes: "file_hashes" }
    >,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly source: Schema.Literal<"unspecified">
        readonly type: Schema.String
        readonly elementHash: Schema.String
        readonly message: Schema.String
      }>,
      { readonly elementHash: "element_hash" }
    >
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PassportElementErrorDataField

Represents an issue in one of the data fields that was provided by the user. The error is considered resolved when the field's value changes.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const PassportElementErrorDataField: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly source: Schema.Literal<"data">

    readonly fieldName: Schema.String
    readonly dataHash: Schema.String
    readonly message: Schema.String
  }>,
  { readonly fieldName: "field_name"; readonly dataHash: "data_hash" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PassportElementErrorFile

Represents an issue with a document scan. The error is considered resolved when the file with the document scan changes.

**Signature**

```ts

    readonly source: Schema.Literal<"file">

>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PassportElementErrorFiles

```ts
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PassportFile

This object represents a file uploaded to Telegram Passport. Currently all Telegram Passport files are in JPEG format when decrypted and don't exceed 10MB.

```ts
    readonly fileSize: "file_size"

>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PollAnswer

This object represents an answer of a user in a non-anonymous poll.

**Signature**

```ts

          readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        }>,
        {
```

## ProximityAlertTriggered

This object represents the content of a service message, sent whenever a user in the chat triggers a proximity alert set by another user.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ProximityAlertTriggered: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly traveler: Schema.encodeKeys<
    Schema.Struct<{
      readonly id: Schema.Number
      readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean

      readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
      readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    }>,
    {
      readonly isBot: "is_bot"
      readonly firstName: "first_name"
      readonly lastName: "last_name"
      readonly languageCode: "language_code"
      readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
      readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
      readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
      readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
```

## ReactionCount

Represents a reaction added to a message along with the number of times it was added.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReactionCount: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly type: Schema.Union<
      readonly [
        Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"emoji">; readonly emoji: Schema.String }>,
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"custom_emoji">; readonly customEmojiId: Schema.String }>,
          { readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id" }
        >,
        Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"paid"> }>
      ]
    >
    readonly totalCount: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly totalCount: "total_count" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ReactionType

This object describes the type of a reaction. Currently, it can be one of - ReactionTypeEmoji - ReactionTypeCustomEmoji - ReactionTypePaid

```ts

  readonly [
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"emoji">; readonly emoji: Schema.String }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"custom_emoji">; readonly customEmojiId: Schema.String }>,

>
```

## ReplyKeyboardMarkup

This object represents a custom keyboard with reply options (see Introduction to bots for details and examples). Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a business account.

Added in v0.1.0

## ReplyKeyboardRemove

Upon receiving a message with this object, Telegram clients will remove the current custom keyboard and display the default letter-keyboard. By default, custom keyboards are displayed until a new keyboard is sent by a bot. An exception is made for one-time keyboards that are hidden immediately after the user presses a button (see ReplyKeyboardMarkup). Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a business account.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReplyKeyboardRemove: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly removeKeyboard: Schema.Boolean; readonly selective: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean> }>,
  { readonly removeKeyboard: "remove_keyboard" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ReplyParameters

Describes reply parameters for the message that is being sent.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReplyParameters: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly messageId: Schema.Number
    readonly chatId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>>
    readonly allowSendingWithoutReply: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly quote: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Literal<"an">>
    readonly quoteParseMode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly quoteEntities: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{
            readonly type: Schema.String
            readonly offset: Schema.Number
            readonly length: Schema.Number
            readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly user: Schema.optionalKey<
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly id: Schema.Number
                  readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }
              >
            >
            readonly language: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly customEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly unixTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
            readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          }>,
          {
            readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
            readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
            readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
          }
        >
      >
    >
    readonly quotePosition: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly checklistTaskId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly pollOptionId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  {
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly allowSendingWithoutReply: "allow_sending_without_reply"
    readonly quoteParseMode: "quote_parse_mode"
    readonly quoteEntities: "quote_entities"
    readonly quotePosition: "quote_position"
    readonly checklistTaskId: "checklist_task_id"
    readonly pollOptionId: "poll_option_id"
  }
>
```

## RevenueWithdrawalState

This object describes the state of a revenue withdrawal operation. Currently, it can be one of - RevenueWithdrawalStatePending - RevenueWithdrawalStateSucceeded - RevenueWithdrawalStateFailed

```ts
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"pending"> }>,

      readonly type: Schema.Literal<"succeeded">

      readonly url: Schema.String
    }>,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"failed"> }>
  ]
>
```

## RichBlock

This object represents a block in a rich formatted message. Currently, it can be any of the following types: - RichBlockParagraph - RichBlockSectionHeading - RichBlockPreformatted - RichBlockFooter - RichBlockDivider - RichBlockMathematicalExpression - RichBlockAnchor - RichBlockList - RichBlockBlockQuotation - RichBlockPullQuotation - RichBlockCollage - RichBlockSlideshow - RichBlockTable - RichBlockDetails - RichBlockMap - RichBlockAnimation - RichBlockAudio - RichBlockPhoto - RichBlockVideo - RichBlockVoiceNote - RichBlockThinking

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const RichBlock: Schema.Codec<RichBlock, unknown, never, never>
```

Added in v0.1.0

```ts
}>
```

```ts
    {
      readonly horizontalAccuracy: "horizontal_accuracy"
      readonly livePeriod: "live_period"
      readonly proximityAlertRadius: "proximity_alert_radius"
    }
  >
  readonly zoom: Schema.Number
  readonly width: Schema.Number
  readonly height: Schema.Number
  readonly caption: Schema.optionalKey<
    Schema.Struct<{
      readonly text: Schema.suspend<Schema.Codec<RichText, unknown, never, never>>
      readonly credit: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.suspend<Schema.Codec<RichText, unknown, never, never>>>
    }>
  >
}>
```

## RichBlockThinking

A block with a "Thinking..." placeholder, corresponding to the custom HTML tag <tg-thinking>. The block may be used only in sendRichMessageDraft, therefore it can't be received in messages. See https://t.me/addemoji/AIActions for examples of custom emoji, which are recommended for usage in the block.

```ts
}>
```

## RichText

This object represents a rich formatted text. Currently, it can be either a String for plain text, an Array of RichText, or any of the following types: - RichTextBold - RichTextItalic - RichTextUnderline - RichTextStrikethrough - RichTextSpoiler - RichTextDateTime - RichTextTextMention - RichTextSubscript - RichTextSuperscript - RichTextMarked - RichTextCode - RichTextCustomEmoji - RichTextMathematicalExpression - RichTextUrl - RichTextEmailAddress - RichTextPhoneNumber - RichTextBankCardNumber - RichTextMention - RichTextHashtag - RichTextCashtag - RichTextBotCommand - RichTextAnchor - RichTextAnchorLink - RichTextReference - RichTextReferenceLink

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const RichText: Schema.Codec<RichText, unknown, never, never>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## StarTransaction

Describes a Telegram Star transaction. Note that if the buyer initiates a chargeback with the payment provider from whom they acquired Stars (e.g., Apple, Google) following this transaction, the refunded Stars will be deducted from the bot's balance. This is outside of Telegram's control.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const StarTransaction: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly id: Schema.String
    readonly amount: Schema.Number
    readonly nanostarAmount: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly date: Schema.Number
    readonly source: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.Union<
        readonly [
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"user">
              readonly transactionType: Schema.String
              readonly user: Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly id: Schema.Number
                  readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }
              >
              readonly affiliate: Schema.optionalKey<
                Schema.encodeKeys<
                  Schema.Struct<{
                    readonly affiliateUser: Schema.optionalKey<
                      Schema.encodeKeys<
                        Schema.Struct<{
                          readonly id: Schema.Number
                          readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                          readonly firstName: Schema.String
                          readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        }>,
                        {
                          readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                          readonly firstName: "first_name"
                          readonly lastName: "last_name"
                          readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                          readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
```

Added in v0.1.0

## StoryArea

Describes a clickable area on a story media.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const StoryArea: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly position: Schema.encodeKeys<
    Schema.Struct<{
      readonly xPercentage: Schema.Number
      readonly yPercentage: Schema.Number
      readonly widthPercentage: Schema.Number
      readonly heightPercentage: Schema.Number
      readonly rotationAngle: Schema.Number
      readonly cornerRadiusPercentage: Schema.Number
    }>,
    {
      readonly xPercentage: "x_percentage"
      readonly yPercentage: "y_percentage"
      readonly widthPercentage: "width_percentage"
      readonly heightPercentage: "height_percentage"
      readonly rotationAngle: "rotation_angle"
      readonly cornerRadiusPercentage: "corner_radius_percentage"
    }
  >
  readonly type: Schema.Union<
    readonly [
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"location">
        readonly latitude: Schema.Number
        readonly longitude: Schema.Number
        readonly address: Schema.optionalKey<
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly countryCode: Schema.String
              readonly state: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
              readonly city: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
              readonly street: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            }>,
            { readonly countryCode: "country_code" }
          >
        >
      }>,
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly type: Schema.Literal<"suggested_reaction">
          readonly reactionType: Schema.Union<
            readonly [
              Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"emoji">; readonly emoji: Schema.String }>,
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"custom_emoji">; readonly customEmojiId: Schema.String }>,
                { readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id" }
              >,
              Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"paid"> }>
            ]
          >
          readonly isDark: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          readonly isFlipped: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        }>,
        { readonly reactionType: "reaction_type"; readonly isDark: "is_dark"; readonly isFlipped: "is_flipped" }
      >,
      Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"link">; readonly url: Schema.String }>,
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly type: Schema.Literal<"weather">
          readonly temperature: Schema.Number
          readonly emoji: Schema.String
          readonly backgroundColor: Schema.Number
        }>,
        { readonly backgroundColor: "background_color" }
      >,
      Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"unique_gift">; readonly name: Schema.String }>
    ]
  >
}>
```

## StoryAreaType

Describes the type of a clickable area on a story. Currently, it can be one of - StoryAreaTypeLocation - StoryAreaTypeSuggestedReaction - StoryAreaTypeLink - StoryAreaTypeWeather - StoryAreaTypeUniqueGift

**Signature**

```ts

            Schema.encodeKeys<

        readonly isFlipped: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      { readonly reactionType: "reaction_type"; readonly isDark: "is_dark"; readonly isFlipped: "is_flipped" }
    >,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"link">; readonly url: Schema.String }>,
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly type: Schema.Literal<"weather">
        readonly temperature: Schema.Number
        readonly emoji: Schema.String
        readonly backgroundColor: Schema.Number
      }>,
      { readonly backgroundColor: "background_color" }
    >,
    Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"unique_gift">; readonly name: Schema.String }>
  ]
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## StoryAreaTypeLink

Describes a story area pointing to an HTTP or tg:// link. Currently, a story can have up to 3 link areas.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const StoryAreaTypeLink: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly type: Schema.Literal<"link">
  readonly url: Schema.String
}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## StoryAreaTypeLocation

Describes a story area pointing to a location. Currently, a story can have up to 10 location areas.

```ts
        readonly street: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>

}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

Added in v0.1.0

## SuccessfulPayment

This object contains basic information about a successful payment. Note that if the buyer initiates a chargeback with the relevant payment provider following this transaction, the funds may be debited from your balance. This is outside of Telegram's control.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SuccessfulPayment: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly currency: Schema.String
    readonly totalAmount: Schema.Number
    readonly invoicePayload: Schema.String
    readonly subscriptionExpirationDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly isRecurring: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly isFirstRecurring: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly shippingOptionId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly orderInfo: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly name: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly phoneNumber: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly email: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          readonly shippingAddress: Schema.optionalKey<
            Schema.encodeKeys<
              Schema.Struct<{
                readonly countryCode: Schema.String
                readonly state: Schema.String
                readonly city: Schema.String
                readonly streetLine1: Schema.String
                readonly streetLine2: Schema.String
                readonly postCode: Schema.String
              }>,
              {
                readonly countryCode: "country_code"
                readonly streetLine1: "street_line1"
                readonly streetLine2: "street_line2"
                readonly postCode: "post_code"
              }
            >
          >
        }>,
        { readonly phoneNumber: "phone_number"; readonly shippingAddress: "shipping_address" }
      >
    >
    readonly telegramPaymentChargeId: Schema.String
    readonly providerPaymentChargeId: Schema.String
  }>,
  {
    readonly totalAmount: "total_amount"
    readonly invoicePayload: "invoice_payload"
    readonly subscriptionExpirationDate: "subscription_expiration_date"
    readonly isRecurring: "is_recurring"
    readonly isFirstRecurring: "is_first_recurring"
    readonly shippingOptionId: "shipping_option_id"
    readonly orderInfo: "order_info"
    readonly telegramPaymentChargeId: "telegram_payment_charge_id"
    readonly providerPaymentChargeId: "provider_payment_charge_id"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SuggestedPostApprovalFailed

Describes a service message about the failed approval of a suggested post. Currently, only caused by insufficient user funds at the time of approval.

## SwitchInlineQueryChosenChat

This object represents an inline button that switches the current user to inline mode in a chosen chat, with an optional default inline query.

```ts
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>

                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {

                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }
              >
            >

            readonly customEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>

            readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>

            readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
            readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
          }
        >
      >
    >
    readonly position: Schema.Number
    readonly isManual: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  { readonly isManual: "is_manual" }
>
```

## TransactionPartner

This object describes the source of a transaction, or its recipient for outgoing transactions. Currently, it can be one of - TransactionPartnerUser - TransactionPartnerChat - TransactionPartnerAffiliateProgram - TransactionPartnerFragment - TransactionPartnerTelegramAds - TransactionPartnerTelegramApi - TransactionPartnerOther
