## VideoChatParticipantsInvited

This object represents a service message about new members invited to a video chat.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const VideoChatParticipantsInvited: Schema.Struct<{
  readonly users: Schema.$Array<
    Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly id: Schema.Number
        readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
        readonly firstName: Schema.String
        readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      {
        readonly isBot: "is_bot"
        readonly firstName: "first_name"
        readonly lastName: "last_name"
        readonly languageCode: "language_code"
        readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
        readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
        readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
        readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
        readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
        readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
        readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
        readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
        readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
        readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
        readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
        readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
      }
    >
  >
}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## VideoChatScheduled

This object represents a service message about a video chat scheduled in the chat.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const VideoChatScheduled: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly startDate: Schema.Number }>,
  { readonly startDate: "start_date" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## VideoChatStarted

This object represents a service message about a video chat started in the chat. Currently holds no information.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const VideoChatStarted: Schema.Struct<{}>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## VideoNote

This object represents a video message (available in Telegram apps as of v.4.0).

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const VideoNote: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly fileId: Schema.String
    readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String
    readonly length: Schema.Number
    readonly duration: Schema.Number
    readonly thumbnail: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.encodeKeys<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly fileId: Schema.String
          readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String
          readonly width: Schema.Number
          readonly height: Schema.Number
          readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        }>,
        { readonly fileId: "file_id"; readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"; readonly fileSize: "file_size" }
      >
    >
    readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  { readonly fileId: "file_id"; readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"; readonly fileSize: "file_size" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## VideoQuality

This object represents a video file of a specific quality.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const VideoQuality: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly fileId: Schema.String
    readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String
    readonly width: Schema.Number
    readonly height: Schema.Number
    readonly codec: Schema.String
    readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  { readonly fileId: "file_id"; readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"; readonly fileSize: "file_size" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## Voice

This object represents a voice note.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const Voice: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly fileId: Schema.String
    readonly fileUniqueId: Schema.String
    readonly duration: Schema.Number
    readonly mimeType: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly fileSize: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  {
    readonly fileId: "file_id"
    readonly fileUniqueId: "file_unique_id"
    readonly mimeType: "mime_type"
    readonly fileSize: "file_size"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## WebAppData

Describes data sent from a Web App to the bot.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const WebAppData: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly data: Schema.String; readonly buttonText: Schema.String }>,
  { readonly buttonText: "button_text" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## WebAppInfo

Describes a Web App.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const WebAppInfo: Schema.Struct<{ readonly url: Schema.String }>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## WebhookInfo

Describes the current status of a webhook.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const WebhookInfo: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly url: Schema.String
    readonly hasCustomCertificate: Schema.Boolean
    readonly pendingUpdateCount: Schema.Number
    readonly ipAddress: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly lastErrorDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly lastErrorMessage: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly lastSynchronizationErrorDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly maxConnections: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly allowedUpdates: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.$Array<Schema.String>>
  }>,
  {
    readonly hasCustomCertificate: "has_custom_certificate"
    readonly pendingUpdateCount: "pending_update_count"
    readonly ipAddress: "ip_address"
    readonly lastErrorDate: "last_error_date"
    readonly lastErrorMessage: "last_error_message"
    readonly lastSynchronizationErrorDate: "last_synchronization_error_date"
    readonly maxConnections: "max_connections"
    readonly allowedUpdates: "allowed_updates"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## WriteAccessAllowed

This object represents a service message about a user allowing a bot to write messages after adding it to the attachment menu, launching a Web App from a link, or accepting an explicit request from a Web App sent by the method requestWriteAccess.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const WriteAccessAllowed: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly fromRequest: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly webAppName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly fromAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly fromRequest: "from_request"
    readonly webAppName: "web_app_name"
    readonly fromAttachmentMenu: "from_attachment_menu"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0
